prompt_text:
### Demographics: 53-year-old Asian woman

### Visit type: Follow-up visit (12-month follow-up)

### Reason for visit / current symptoms
Reason for visit: Routine follow-up (every 3 months) | Diagnosis context: 9 years ago Diagnosed with type 2 diabetes during urgent care evaluation for fatigue/blurred vision
Current symptoms: Occasional fatigue and thirst with nocturia; no DKA/HHS signs; no severe hypoglycemia

### History
- Other conditions: Chronic kidney disease Stage 2 (60-89)
ASCVD: Peripheral artery disease
Body mass index category: Overweight
Recurrent Complicated Urinary Tract Infections
Major Depressive Disorder
- Diabetes-related comorbidities: CKD: Stage 2 (60-89); HF (No); ASCVD: Peripheral artery disease; MASLD: Normal; BMI Category: Overweight
- Family history: Type 2 diabetes (older sister)
- Social history: Current smoker (10 cigarettes/day for 20 years; ~10 pack-years); Alcohol 1-2 drinks/week

### Medication information
- Current medications: Metformin 1000mg twice daily; Semaglutide 1mg once weekly; Glimepiride 2mg once daily; Insulin Detemir 20units once daily; Sertraline (50 mg daily), Rosuvastatin (10 mg daily), Lisinopril (10 mg daily), Finerenone (10 mg daily), Nitrofurantoin (100 mg twice daily for prophylaxis)

### Physical exam (current)
Weight 55.8 kg; Height 153.4 cm; BMI 23.7 kg/m²; Blood pressure 129/77 mmHg

### Laboratory values (with date / relative timing)
Format: YYYY-MM-DD value or relative timing (12 months ago / 9 months ago / 6 months ago / 3 months ago / current)
Order: 12 months ago -> 9 months ago -> 6 months ago -> 3 months ago -> current
- Glycemia: HbA1c (12 months ago 11.2%; 9 months ago 11.0%; 6 months ago 11.0%; 3 months ago 11.0%; current 10.5%), FPG (12 months ago 320mg/dL; 9 months ago 293mg/dL; 6 months ago 242mg/dL; 3 months ago 257mg/dL; current 229mg/dL)
- Anthropometrics / blood pressure: Weight (12 months ago 53.3kg; 9 months ago 54.1kg; 6 months ago 56.2kg; 3 months ago 54.7kg; current 55.8kg), Height (12 months ago 153.4cm; 9 months ago 153.4cm; 6 months ago 153.4cm; 3 months ago 153.4cm; current 153.4cm), BMI (12 months ago 23.0kg/m²; 9 months ago 23.0kg/m²; 6 months ago 24.0kg/m²; 3 months ago 23.0kg/m²; current 23.7kg/m²), SBP (12 months ago 126mmHg; 9 months ago 126mmHg; 6 months ago 127mmHg; 3 months ago 125mmHg; current 129mmHg), DBP (12 months ago 73mmHg; 9 months ago 76mmHg; 6 months ago 77mmHg; 3 months ago 75mmHg; current 77mmHg)
- Liver function: ALT (12 months ago 32U/L; 9 months ago 32U/L; 6 months ago 33U/L; 3 months ago 33U/L; current 29U/L), AST (12 months ago 27U/L; 9 months ago 22U/L; 6 months ago 28U/L; 3 months ago 23U/L; current 24U/L), Total Bilirubin (12 months ago 1.2mg/dL; 9 months ago 1.2mg/dL; 6 months ago 1.1mg/dL; 3 months ago 1.1mg/dL; current 1.1mg/dL)
- Kidney: eGFR (12 months ago 73mL/min/1.73m²; 9 months ago 77mL/min/1.73m²; 6 months ago 73mL/min/1.73m²; 3 months ago 72mL/min/1.73m²; current 74mL/min/1.73m²), UACR (12 months ago 113mg/g; 9 months ago 113mg/g; 6 months ago 84mg/g; 3 months ago 108mg/g; current 90mg/g)
- Lipids: LDL (12 months ago 67mg/dL; 9 months ago 67mg/dL; 6 months ago 69mg/dL; 3 months ago 73mg/dL; current 70mg/dL); HDL (12 months ago 50mg/dL; 9 months ago 46mg/dL; 6 months ago 46mg/dL; 3 months ago 46mg/dL; current 48mg/dL); Triglycerides (12 months ago 97mg/dL; 9 months ago 120mg/dL; 6 months ago 102mg/dL; 3 months ago 99mg/dL; current 108mg/dL)
- Hemoglobin: Hemoglobin (12 months ago 13.0g/dL; 9 months ago 13.8g/dL; 6 months ago 14.0g/dL; 3 months ago 13.2g/dL; current 13.0g/dL)
- Additional tests: urine ketone Negative (Current); fasting C-peptide Not measured (Current)

### Individualized treatment decision factors
Current adherence and self-management: Very poor adherence (estimated <50%); SMBG rarely performed; lifestyle control severely limited.
Financial context: Patient has comprehensive insurance with minimal out-of-pocket burden and reports no financial barriers to clinically indicated therapies (budget ≤ KRW 1,000,000/month).
